document.source_title: IPL 2026 Updated Points Table: Bengaluru on top after last-ball thriller; Chennai playoff hopes alive; Mumbai & Lucknow eliminated

claims.claim_text: RCB is at the top of the IPL 2026 points table.
claims.evidence_text: RCB’s title defence is gathering steam as they now sit in first place with 14 points from 11 matches.

claims.claim_text: Mumbai Indians and Lucknow Super Giants have been eliminated from the playoff race.
claims.evidence_text: both Mumbai Indians and Lucknow Super Giants have been eliminated from the playoff race.

entities.name: Royal Challengers Bengaluru
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Bengaluru, India.
entities.evidence_text: Royal Challengers Bengaluru edged past Mumbai Indians in a last-ball thriller in Raipur.

entities.name: Mumbai Indians
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Mumbai, India.
entities.evidence_text: Mumbai Indians have been eliminated from the playoff race.

entities.name: Lucknow Super Giants
entities.description: A franchise cricket team based in Lucknow, India.
entities.evidence_text: Lucknow Super Giants have been eliminated from the playoff race.

entities.name: Bhuvneshwar Kumar
entities.description: An Indian cricketer known for his bowling.
entities.evidence_text: Swing king Bhuvneshwar Kumar broke Mumbai’s back with his four-wicket haul.

entities.name: Heinrich Klaasen
entities.description: A South African cricketer known for his batting.
entities.evidence_text: SRH’s destructive middle-order batter and finisher Heinrich Klaasen continues to top the Orange Cap list.

events.location: Shaheed Veer Narayan Singh International Stadium, Raipur
events.evidence_text: RCB reached top of points table with a dramatic two-wicket victory over MI in a last-ball thriller on Sunday at the Shaheed Veer Narayan Singh International Stadium in Raipur.
Chennai Super Kings registered their sixth win of the season and third in a row after beating Lucknow Super Giants at home in Chennai.

metrics.name: RCB Points
metrics.evidence_text: RCB’s title defence is gathering steam as they now sit in first place with 14 points from 11 matches.

metrics.name: Bhuvneshwar Kumar Wickets
metrics.evidence_text: Bhuvneshwar Kumar broke Mumbai’s back with his four-wicket haul and, in the process, became the leading wicket-taker of the season with 21 scalps from 11 matches.
